_comment: Copy this file to ~/.claude/data/personas/config.json and fill in api_key. The provider field selects which block under 'providers' is active. NEVER commit the real config.json — it contains secrets.

anthropic_gateway_example._note: Example for a custom Anthropic-compatible gateway (e.g., enterprise proxy that routes Claude through Vertex). Paste your gateway's base_url and key.

openai_compat_example._note: Example for any OpenAI-compatible gateway (OpenRouter, vLLM, Together, etc.).
